response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing or navigation pipelines, and shows no evidence of distributed systems or real-time traffic integration work critical to the role.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO use
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Proven track record in low-latency systems and performance-critical applications
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or map tiling
Lacks explicit experience with distributed systems, fault tolerance, or navigation data pipelines
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the required C++ core stack
